_note: isiZulu strings below are placeholders for structure only. Approved narrative text and translations will be provided by IISD and the City of Johannesburg per the RFP.
site.title: Ideshibhodi Yomthelela Wezixazululo Ezisekelwe Emvelweni eGoli
site.tagline: Sixhumanisa umthelela wezixazululo ezisekelwe emvelweni eGoli
lang.label: Ulimi
hero.title: Sivuselela iJukskei, ngokungenelela ngakunye
hero.lede: Le deshibhodi ikhombisa ukuthi yiziphi izixazululo ezisekelwe emvelweni ezilethwa ngasemfuleni oPhezulu weJukskei susukela edolobheni langaphakathi ngeLorentzville, iBez Valley, nase-Alexandra, nokuthi zizinciphisa kanjani izingozi zezikhukhula, zipholise imiphakathi, zithuthukise imvelo, futhi zidale amathuba endawo.
hero.note: Umkhiqizo osebenzayo oyisisekelo. Ulungiselelwe iDolobha laseGoli, i-IISD, kanye nobambiswano lwe-SUNCASA.
context.title: Uhlelo lwe-SUNCASA ngamafuphi
context.note: Izinhloso zohlelo jikelele lwasemfuleni oPhezulu weJukskei. Amanani ezindaweni kwenye indawo kule deshibhodi ayisibonelo futhi alinde ikhathalogi yedatha ye-SUNCASA.
pillars.title: Izingqikithi ezine zomthelela
pillars.subtitle: Ingqikithi ngayinye iphethe iqoqo elincane lezinkomba ezicacile ezithathwe ku-SUNCASA Performance Management Framework kanye ne-Environmental Management Program.
indicator.noTrend: Umbukiso wethrendi uzotholakala uma ikhathalogi yedatha ye-SUNCASA isiqinisekisiwe.
codesign.title: Yakhelwe nawe, hhayi ngenxa yakho
codesign.body: Le phrothothayiphu iyisiqalo sesigaba sokuqala. Izinkomba eziphawulwe njengezihlongozwayo ziyizinketho zokuxoxwa. Impendulo yababambiqhaza izonquma iqoqo lokugcina.
map.title: Lapho umsebenzi wenzeka khona
map.caption: Izindawo zokungenelela eziyisibonelo emzileni weJukskeikusukela edolobheni langaphakathi ngeBez Valley, i-Queen's Wetland, nase-Alexandra. Ubunjalo obuqondile buzoqinisekiswa busuka kukhathalogi yedatha ye-SUNCASA.
stories.title: Izindaba ezivela emfuleni
stories.subtitle: Izindaba ezimfushane zomphakathi eziphawulwe ngokucacile ezihamba nezinombolo.
story.label: Indaba yomphakathi
data.title: Mayelana nedatha
data.body: Ideshibhodi isebenzisa idatha yokuqapha ye-SUNCASA ekhona kanye nemithombo yomphakathi ekhethiwe. Ayikho idatha entsha eqoqiwe. Amanani aboniswayo kule phrothothayiphu ayisibonelo futhi alinde ikhathalogi yedatha ye-SUNCASA.
footer.owner: Kubanjwe futhi kungokweDolobha laseGoli, iNdinganeni yezeMvelo kanye noLwazi lweMisebenzi ePhezulu
footer.project: SUNCASA, Ukukhulisa Izixazululo Zemvelo Zasemadolobheni Zokujwayelana Nesimo Sezulu e-Afrika eseningizimu yeSahara
footer.partners: Ihola yi-IISD ne-World Resources Institute, ixhaswe yiGlobal Affairs Canada, ngoDolobha laseGoli, i-JCPZ, i-JICP, i-Water for the Future, i-Women for Climate Justice Southern Africa (GenderCC SA), i-Zutari, ama-Alexandra Water Warriors, nesiKhwama Sezindlela saseGoli
footer.rights: Ubunikazi obugcwele bekhodi, ukumiswa, nedatha bukweDolobha laseGoli.
data.meta.title: Izincazelo zezinkomba nemethadatha
data.meta.body: Inkomba ngayinye ilandela imodeli yezinkomba ye-SUNCASA: igama elilula, isizathu sokuthi ibalulekile, inani lakamuva, umthombo, ukuvuselelwa kaningi, nezexwayiso ezicacile.
data.sources.title: Imithombo yedatha
data.sources.body: I-SUNCASA Performance Management Framework kanye ne-Environmental Management Program, kuhlanganiswe namasethi edatha akhethiwe omphakathi nabalingani lapho etholakala khona kalula.
data.limitations.title: Imikhawulo
data.limitations.body: Amanani ayisibonelo alinde ikhathalogi yedatha ye-SUNCASA. Ayikho idatha yesikhathi sangempela, akukho ukubikezela, futhi akukho ukuqoqwa kwedatha entsha kule MVP.
data.update.title: Indlela yokuvuselela
data.update.body: Idatha ilungiswa nge-CSV noma i-Excel bese ifakwa kwideshibhodi ngesikhathi sokwakha, igcina idatha, ukwethulwa, nokuqukethwe kwehlukanisiwe ngokugcwele ukuze kube lula ukugcina.
meth.title: Indlela nendlela yokusebenza
meth.lede: Leli khasi lifingqa indlela le-MVP eyakhiwe ngayo nokuthi iklanyelwe kanjani ukukhula ibe yipulatifomu yedolobha lonke ngaphandle kokwakha kabusha.
meth.principles.title: Imigomo yokwakha
meth.principles.1: Ukuxhumana kuqala, hhayi ithuluzi lokuhlaziya langaphakathi.
meth.principles.2: Kuqhutshwa yizinkomba futhi kusekelwa yindaba, kugqugquzelwa yiMyPeg.
meth.principles.3: Ulimi olulula, umehluko ophezulu, futhi kuqaphela i-WCAG.
meth.principles.4: Kuhambisana neselula futhi kunobubanzi obuncane bedatha ngokuzenzakalelayo.
meth.roadmap.title: Uhlelo lokukhula
meth.phase1.label: Isigaba 1
meth.phase1.title: I-SUNCASA MVP
meth.phase1.body: Izindawo zokungenelela zeJukskei, izinkomba ezikhethiwe, imibukiso emile nenokusebenzisana okuncane, isakhiwo sokuqukethwe se-EN ne-ZU.
meth.phase2.label: Isigaba 2
meth.phase2.title: I-SUNCASA ethuthukisiwe
meth.phase2.body: Izinkomba eziningi, izindaba ezicebile, izihlungi ezikhethwayo, nokuxhumana kwedatha ye-Power BI noma i-Azure lapho iDolobha lifuna khona.
meth.phase3.label: Isigaba 3
meth.phase3.title: Ipulatifomu ye-NbS yedolobha lonke
meth.phase3.body: Ikhathalogi yezinkomba enwetshiwe kulo lonke iGoli, ukuhumusha okuzenzakalelayo, ukuqhathanisa, nomsebenzi wokuqoqa izimali.
meth.oos.title: Ngokusobala ngaphandle kwesikhundla se-MVP
meth.oos.2: Akukho ukuhlaziya okuthuthukisiwe noma ukufunda komshini
meth.oos.4: Akukho ukumboza kwedolobha lonke kulesi sigaba
map.fallback: Imephu esebenzayo idinga i-JavaScript. Izindawo zokungenelela emzileni weJukskei susukela edolobheni langaphakathi ngeBez Valley, i-Queen's Wetland, nase-Alexandra zihlanganisa izindawo ezihlanziwe, izindonga zomfula ezivuselelwe, izindawo zokutshala izihlahla, nezindawo zokuvuselela umngcele womfula, zonke ziqinisekiswe kusukela kukhathalogi yedatha ye-SUNCASA.
pillar.chart.title: Inqubo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi
pillar.proposed.title: Izinkomba eziphakanyisiwe
pillar.proposed.body: Lezi zinkomba yizinketho zokuxoxwa ngesigaba sokuqala. Ukubandakanya kwazo kuncike ekutholakaleni kwedatha kanye nezinhloso zababambiqhaza.
story.disclaimer: Indaba nokuhumushwa kuzohlinzekwa yi-IISD nesiDolobha saseGoli.
story.1.title: Ukuguqula ukudla okuyithrashi kube yigugu
story.1.excerpt: Ukungcolile okukhishwe eJukskei kwenziwa umsebenzi wobuciko bomphakathi ngabacobi bendawo e-Alexandra, okuguqula ukuhlanza kube yidina.
story.2.title: Ama-Water Warriors
story.2.excerpt: Isiqhingi somphakathi siyakhipha ukungcolile futhi sivuselela izindonga, sithola imali ngokuvikela izindlu ezikhukhulwayo.
story.3.title: Umthunzi wololiye lonke
story.3.excerpt: Izihlahla ezitshalwe eduze nezindlu ezingangenwa mali ziletha ukupholisa nokuhlaza ezindaweni ebezingenalo nalinye.
story.4.title: Izibambo zokungcolile ziba ngobuciko bomfula
story.4.excerpt: Izibambo ezadaliwe ngesandula zibamba ukungcolile ngaphambi kokuba kufake e-Alexandra, kuyilapho umcobi uHannelie Coetzee nama-Water Warriors benguqula ukungcolile kube yisimgculunga.
404.title: Ikhasi alitholakalanga
404.body: Ikhasi olifunayo aliyona ingxenye yale deshibhodi ye-MVP.
